#  View a Change Event (Legacy) 
#####  Legacy Content
Procore has started a phased release of the new change events list view. If your project has been updated to use the new view, you will no longer use the Steps in this tutorial. Instead, see [Create Change Events](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/create-change-events). To learn about the phased release, see [Change Events: Modernized Change Events List View](https://support.procore.com/tc/procore/Legacy/Release%5FDocumentation%5FArchives/2022/Change%5FEvents:%5FNew%5FChange%5FEvents%5FLine%5FItems%5FView%5F%28Beta%29).
##  Background 
After a change event is created, you can follow the steps below to view it in the project's Change Events tool.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Change Events tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Change Events** tool.
  2. Under the **Detail** tab, click the change event link to open it.
  3. Under the **General** tab, you have these options:
     * To modify the change event, click the **Edit** button. See [Edit a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-events-project/tutorials/edit-a-change-event).
     * If the change event is linked to a T&M ticket (see [Create a Change Event from a T&M Ticket](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/create-a-change-event-from-a-tm-ticket) or [Add a T&M Ticket to a Change Event](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/tm-tickets-project/tutorials/add-a-tm-ticket-to-a-change-event)), you have these options:* **Download PDF**. To download a PDF copy of the T&M Ticket to your computer, click this link.* **View Ticket**. To open the T&M Ticket in the project's T&M Tickets tool, click this link.   
![Change Event Download Pdf](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/863860c0f6d8af85b8e4c3d1b6fe7d6d/d7d363a331bf563a8713281b106ccf1a/change-event-download-pdf.png?fm=webp)
     * To download any files attached to the change event, click one of these options: 
#####  Note
File attachments from linked T&M Tickets are also transferred to the 'Attachments' section when a change event is created, so you can download those attachments.
* If there are multiple files attached to the change event, click **Download All** to download all of the attachments to your computer.* If you want to download a single file, click that file's link to download it to your computer.
  4. In the change event line items table at the bottom of the page, you have these options:
     * **Bulk Actions**  
To use the options in the bulk actions menu, place a checkmark next to the change event line items to work with. Then choose the **Bulk Actions** menu option of your choice.
     * **Edit**  
To modify one of the line items, click the **Edit** button.
     * **Search**  
To search for a specific change event line item, enter terms in the **Search** field and click the magnifying glass icon.
     * **Add Filter**  
To add filters to narrow the change event line items in view, click the **Add Filter** menu.

description: How to view a change event using the project's Change Events tool.
